title: Expanded Delight
description:
An addon mod for Farmer's Delight
that adds many more crops and functionality to the base mod
body:
📖About:

Expanded Delight is a mod that gradually expands upon Farmer's Delight by adding new crops, blocks, workstations, and more! You can find the current and future features here!

 

🔨 Mod Loaders

Expanded Delight is supported for NeoForge and Fabric (1.21.1 fabric is being worked on)

 

📦 Beta Version

This mod is under development, that's why it may be unstable sometimes. Report any issues to GitHub, it can be found below.
